tool_purpose: Dreamlike Photoreal 2.0 is a photorealistic model based on Stable Diffusion 1.5, made by dreamlike.art. It can be used to generate photorealistic images from text prompts. Framework: Hugging Face. Functionality: Text-to-Image. API call: StableDiffusionPipeline.from_pretrained('dreamlike-art/dreamlike-photoreal-2.0', torch_dtype=torch.float16)(prompt).images[0].
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
doc_snippets: Dreamlike Photoreal 2.0 is a photorealistic model based on Stable Diffusion 1.5, made by dreamlike.art. It can be used to generate photorealistic images from text prompts. Framework: Hugging Face. Functionality: Text-to-Image. API call: StableDiffusionPipeline.from_pretrained('dreamlike-art/dreamlike-photoreal-2.0', torch_dtype=torch.float16)(prompt).images[0].
